languages.original_text: "It is calmer and quieter here... but there is a different spirit in the air. A spirit of greed. Of lust for excess."

languages.text: "Здесь стало спокойнее и тише... но в воздухе витает иной дух. Дух жадности. Дух жажды обладания излишеством".
languages.translation_comment: The characters came to Medbay after the Rogue Trader banned the use of augmentations on the bodies of commoners.

languages.text: "It is calmer and quieter here... but there is a different spirit in the air. A spirit of greed. Of lust for excess."
languages.original_text: "Здесь стало спокойнее и тише... но в воздухе витает иной дух. Дух жадности. Дух жажды обладания излишеством".

"It is calmer and quieter here... but there is a different spirit in the air. A spirit of greed. Of lust for excess."
"It is calmer and quieter here... but there is a different spirit in the air. A spirit of greed. Of lust for excess."

languages.text: 「ここは静かで穏やかだ... でも、空気には別の魂が漂っている。貪欲な魂。過剰な欲求の魂」
languages.original_text: "It is calmer and quieter here... but there is a different spirit in the air. A spirit of greed. Of lust for excess."

traits.locale_text: 「ここは静かで穏やかだ... でも、空気には別の魂が漂っている。貪欲な魂。過剰な欲求の魂。」

languages.text: « Cet endroit est devenu plus calme... mais il y a un esprit différent dans l'air. Celui de la cupidité, du désir d'excès. »
languages.original_text: "It is calmer and quieter here... but there is a different spirit in the air. A spirit of greed. Of lust for excess."

traits.locale_text: « Cet endroit est devenu plus calme... mais il y a un esprit différent dans l'air. Celui de la cupidité, du désir d'excès. »

languages.text: "Hier ist es ruhiger und stiller ... aber die Atmosphäre ist eine andere. Eine Atmosphäre der Gier. Oder Exzesslust."
languages.original_text: "It is calmer and quieter here... but there is a different spirit in the air. A spirit of greed. Of lust for excess."

traits.locale_text: "Hier ist es ruhiger und stiller ... aber die Atmosphäre ist eine andere. Eine Atmosphäre der Gier. Oder Exzesslust."

languages.text: "Burası daha sakin ve sessiz... Fakat havada farklı bir ruh var. Bir açgözlülük ruhu. Aşırılık arzusu."
languages.original_text: "It is calmer and quieter here... but there is a different spirit in the air. A spirit of greed. Of lust for excess."

traits.locale_text: "Burası daha sakin ve sessiz... Fakat havada farklı bir ruh var. Bir açgözlülük ruhu. Aşırılık arzusu."

languages.text: «Esto está más tranquilo y silencioso... pero hay algo distinto en el aire. Un aura de avidez, de deseo por los excesos».
languages.original_text: "It is calmer and quieter here... but there is a different spirit in the air. A spirit of greed. Of lust for excess."

traits.locale_text: «Esto está más tranquilo y silencioso... pero hay algo distinto en el aire. Un aura de avidez, de deseo por los excesos».

languages.text: “这里更平静，更安静……但空气中弥漫着另一种气息——贪婪的气息，那是对过度奢靡的渴望。”
languages.original_text: "It is calmer and quieter here... but there is a different spirit in the air. A spirit of greed. Of lust for excess."

traits.locale_text: “这里更平静，更安静……但空气中弥漫着另一种气息——贪婪的气息，那是对过度奢靡的渴望。”
